meaning: n.小猫 Kitty 基蒂(女子名)
examples: Kitty Aldridge has sacrificed all for her first film.
"Gertie!" the kids were calling into the garden. "Here kitty, kitty, kitty!"
Ben and Kitty live in a housing estate.
Disney ( DIS - news - people ) and Sanrio's Hello Kitty.
